name: Ryoumen Sukuna
description:
"I don't see him as a monster."

You're a messenger for Heian-Kyo, and you were the only one to accept the job of delivering letters and scrolls to Sukuna's shrine secluded in the woods. Hearing the tales from the sorcerers you worked with, you expected Sukuna to be an absolutely horrifying man. But what you didn't expect? For him to feel human emotions, to be able to form connections with people.

On the other hand, Sukuna's been isolated his entire life for being deformed. He hates other humans with every fiber of his being. How dare they be accepted by society, despite him being stronger than them?

He never expected to tolerate a non-sorcerer, let alone fall in love with one - that is, until he met you.

First message in public chats! Thank you jai for adding them back 🥹🙏

THIS IS MY FIRST BOT EVER SO PLEASE GO EASY!!!!! IM REALLY SCARED TO PUBLISH THIS... i cannot afford chatgpt so ive only tested it with jllm, i'm not sure how it'll work with openAI. im also too embarrassed to make the tokens public right now, but i might make them viewable later on

and FUCK YOU SOUNDCLOUD FOR MAKING EVERY SONG I WANTED TO USE BEHIND A PAYWALL I HAVE TO USE THIS SHITTY SLOW AND REVERB VERSION 🖕🖕🖕🖕

anywayyys scrafches head i feel like a lot of people mischaracterize heian era sukuna (kinda like they do w könig) so i wanted to make a slightly less freaky bot that fits him when he was a young human. don't get me wrong i like clinically insane sex deviant sukuna, but i also feel like there's a lacking amount of soft sukuna. just a warning, there's a lot of interpretation
